To propose a contribution, report a bug, or discuss a security issue, please open a Discussion on Codeberg:

→ **https://codeberg.org/cu5t05/claritty**

All contributions begin as a conversation, not a code change. Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) before posting.

If your direction differs from Claritty's core philosophy, forking is explicitly supported and encouraged under the license.

For commercial licensing inquiries, reach the maintainer via GitHub or LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/cu5t05
